settings.heading: The Nutrava Difference

settings.title: Personalised to You
settings.text: No one-size-fits-all. Your routine is matched to your skin type, concerns, sensitivity, and current habits.

settings.heading: What Goes On Your Skin Matters

settings.title: Real Active Percentages
settings.text: Clinically effective doses of retinol, vitamin C, hyaluronic acid and peptides — not symbolic dustings.

settings.title: Barrier-First Formulas

settings.title: No Secret Ingredients
settings.text: Full INCI lists on every product — nothing hiding behind “proprietary blend.”

settings.heading: Ingredient Spotlight
settings.subheading: The actives behind our best-selling routines

settings.name: Niacinamide
settings.description: A multitasker that refines pores, evens tone, balances oil and strengthens the moisture barrier. Well-tolerated by every skin type — the workhorse active behind our gel moisturiser.

settings.name: Vitamin C
settings.description: The gold standard for brightening and antioxidant defence. Fades dark spots, evens tone, and shields skin from daily UV and pollution damage.

settings.name: Retinol Alternative
settings.description: All the smoothing, line-refining benefits of retinol — without the redness, peeling or downtime. Safe for sensitive skin and pregnancy-conscious users.

settings.name: Kojic Acid
settings.description: One of the most studied tone-correcting actives. Fades stubborn dark spots, post-acne marks, sun damage and uneven patches over consistent use.

settings.name: Peptides
settings.description: Signal molecules that target firmness, fine lines and the look of skin elasticity. The premium addition to any anti-aging routine.

settings.name: Hyaluronic Acid
settings.description: Holds up to 1,000x its weight in water. Pulls moisture into the skin so it stays hydrated through the day, layered into our day cream and gel moisturiser.

settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.subheading: Everything you need to know before building your routine

settings.question: What makes Nutrava different from other skincare brands?
settings.answer: Most skincare is a lottery — you buy what the aisle has. Nutrava matches a routine to your skin type, top concern, sensitivity, and current habits. Every formula is clinically dosed, fragrance-free where it matters, and transparent about what’s inside.

settings.question: How does the personalised quiz work?
settings.answer: Our quiz takes under 60 seconds and asks about your skin type, top concern, current routine, and sensitivity. It branches based on your answers and matches you with a 2–4 product routine built specifically for your skin.

settings.question: How long until I see results?
settings.answer: Hydration and calming products usually feel different on day one. For brightening and anti-aging actives, expect visible improvement in 2–4 weeks of consistent use, with the full benefits building over 6–8 weeks.

settings.question: Can I use these products together?
settings.answer: Yes — every routine is designed to layer. We handle the order and balance so you’re not mixing incompatible actives. A good rule: apply thinnest to thickest, water-based serums before oils, SPF last in the morning.

settings.question: What’s your shipping and returns policy?
settings.answer: Free US shipping on orders over $50, delivered within 3–5 business days. Every product is covered by our 30-day satisfaction guarantee — if it doesn’t work for your skin, we’ll refund you, no questions asked.

settings.question: Are your products vegan and cruelty-free?
settings.answer: 100% cruelty-free, never tested on animals, and the vast majority are vegan. Every product page lists the full INCI ingredient list so you can check for anything you need to avoid.
